title: Gumba — The Room Listens
prompt: A website for an intimate basement jazz club in Kathmandu called Gumba. Late-night, smoky, soulful — a place, not a brand. Show the week's lineup, the room, and how to get a table.

direction.name: Below Street Level
direction.thesis: A descent into Kathmandu’s after-hours listening room, shaped by Didone type, tobacco-dark scenes, and an amber hush.
direction.signature: A slow stage-light pulse and drifting canvas smoke make the basement feel occupied before the first note.
